errors.invalid_date: You can only book from tomorrow up to a maximum of 2 weeks ahead.

cta.bring_val: Notes for the subject to review, textbook for the subject in question, laptop or device if using classroom or similar, pencil case with all necessary items, chargers, sample solved exercises or past exams.
cta.whatsapp_note: You can also contact us on WhatsApp for quick questions.

confirmation.subject: Booking confirmed, {nombre}!
confirmation.thanks: Thank you for booking your class. Here is your appointment confirmation.
confirmation.contact_before: If you want to discuss any aspect of the class before the appointment, you can reach me by phone: {phone}

reminder.subject: Reminder: your class is tomorrow — TutorTrack
reminder.intro: This is a reminder that your class is scheduled for:
reminder.policy_note: If you need to cancel or change the time, please let us know at least 24 hours in advance.
